LanguageData.VQE_TheAncientLab.description: This quest chain will have you explore sealed Vault-Tec blacksites and research vaults where pre-war special projects tried to create improved humans through classified FEV and forced-adaptation programs. Recover their surviving equipment, uncover what became of the dwellers trapped inside, and decide whether those experiments should ever begin again.
LanguageData.VQE_TheAncientLab.label: Vault-Tec blacksite
